narrative:
74 Ohio House district has 69,825 registered voters, with 57.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.7%, a clear Republican lean of 7.3 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -4.7% D−R vs -9.6% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
